methodology: Derived from customer KPI pyramids, 1-year product strategy horizons, and delivery activity using an OKR-inspired structure.

goals.title: 2024-Q1 Nutritionist / Formulation Manager (Power User) outcome goal
goals.objective: Improve Time to approved, compliant formula for Nutritionist / Formulation Manager (Power User) by advancing nail the daily formulation loop: trusted data → constraints → optimization → scenario compare → governed approval. through speed with rigor (solver + scenario workspace + auditability).

linkedCustomerKPIs.description: End-to-end cycle time from request to approved formula ready for production.

linkedBusinessKPIs.description: Annual recurring revenue attributable to this persona segment/accounts.

keyResults.baseline: Baseline to be confirmed from quarterly reporting
keyResults.statement: Decrease Time to approved, compliant formula during the quarter.

keyResults.baseline: Baseline to be confirmed from quarterly reporting
keyResults.statement: Decrease Formulation & scenario work time during the quarter.

keyResults.baseline: Baseline to be confirmed from quarterly reporting
keyResults.statement: Increase ARR during the quarter.

goals.title: 2024-Q2 Operations / Production Manager outcome goal
goals.objective: Improve Plan adherence (schedule vs actual) for Operations / Production Manager by advancing operational reliability on the shop floor: dispatch-ready schedules + clear batch instructions + exception triage. through execute the plan (schedule → dispatch → capture actuals).

linkedCustomerKPIs.description: How closely execution matches the production plan.

linkedBusinessKPIs.description: Annual recurring revenue attributable to this persona segment/accounts.

keyResults.baseline: Baseline to be confirmed from quarterly reporting
keyResults.statement: Increase Plan adherence (schedule vs actual) during the quarter.

keyResults.baseline: Baseline to be confirmed from quarterly reporting
keyResults.statement: Increase Materials & capacity readiness during the quarter.

keyResults.baseline: Baseline to be confirmed from quarterly reporting
keyResults.statement: Increase ARR during the quarter.

goals.title: 2024-Q3 Quality & Compliance Manager outcome goal
goals.objective: Improve Right-first-time release rate for Quality & Compliance Manager by advancing right-first-time quality release: structured specs, automated results intake, and controlled hold/release workflows. through audit-ready release (specs + results + disposition).

linkedCustomerKPIs.description: % of lots released without rework, extended holds, or late documentation.

linkedBusinessKPIs.description: Annual recurring revenue attributable to this persona segment/accounts.

keyResults.baseline: Baseline to be confirmed from quarterly reporting
keyResults.statement: Decrease Right-first-time release rate during the quarter.

keyResults.baseline: Baseline to be confirmed from quarterly reporting
keyResults.statement: Increase Testing & results velocity during the quarter.

keyResults.baseline: Baseline to be confirmed from quarterly reporting
keyResults.statement: Increase ARR during the quarter.

goals.title: 2024-Q4 IT Manager outcome goal
goals.objective: Improve Operational reliability score (uptime + incident impact) for IT Manager by advancing harden the platform: security, sso/rbac, integration reliability, and operational observability. through trusted platform foundations.

linkedCustomerKPIs.description: Ability to keep connected systems available, secure, and performant.

linkedBusinessKPIs.description: Annual recurring revenue attributable to this persona segment/accounts.

keyResults.baseline: Baseline to be confirmed from quarterly reporting
keyResults.statement: Increase Operational reliability of the landscape during the quarter.

keyResults.statement: Increase Availability & performance during the quarter.

keyResults.baseline: Baseline to be confirmed from quarterly reporting
keyResults.statement: Increase ARR during the quarter.

goals.title: 2025-Q1 Procurement / Purchasing outcome goal
goals.objective: Improve Realized input cost savings for Procurement / Purchasing by advancing visibility and control: spend, contracts, landed cost, and approved alternates tied directly to formulation decisions. through cost + risk transparency for inputs.

linkedCustomerKPIs.description: Total landed cost achieved while maintaining supply continuity and quality.

linkedBusinessKPIs.description: Annual recurring revenue attributable to this persona segment/accounts.

linkedInitiatives.description: Supplier Qualification & Spec Exchange initiative focused on improving supplier onboarding & qualification, spec exchange & change notifications, strengthening customer value for IT Manager, and evolving delivery across web, Supplier Spec API.

Integration & API Fabric initiative focused on improving api gateway & service interfaces, event streaming & messaging, strengthening customer value for Mother Earth (Environmental Stakeholder), and evolving delivery across web, Unified API Gateway.

linkedReleases.description: Release of Supplier Qualification & Spec Exchange improvements covering supplier onboarding & qualification, spec exchange & change notifications across web, Supplier Spec API.
Release of Integration & API Fabric improvements covering api gateway & service interfaces, event streaming & messaging across web, Unified API Gateway.

goals.title: 2025-Q3 Executive / Economic Buyer (CEO, COO, GM) outcome goal
goals.objective: Improve Time-to-value (first verified outcome) for Executive / Economic Buyer (CEO, COO, GM) by advancing prove roi fast: deploy the minimum set of workflows that show savings, risk reduction, and faster cycle times. through value realization and executive visibility.

linkedCustomerKPIs.description: Ability to maintain target margin despite volatility.

linkedBusinessKPIs.description: Annual recurring revenue attributable to this persona segment/accounts.

keyResults.baseline: Baseline to be confirmed from quarterly reporting
keyResults.statement: Increase Gross margin stability during the quarter.

keyResults.baseline: Baseline to be confirmed from quarterly reporting
keyResults.statement: Decrease Cost-to-serve visibility during the quarter.

keyResults.baseline: Baseline to be confirmed from quarterly reporting
keyResults.statement: Increase ARR during the quarter.

linkedInitiatives.description: Sustainability & Ingredient Impact Scorecards initiative focused on improving ingredient & nutrient data model, scenario engine (what-if workspace), strengthening customer value for Student (Food & Feed Sciences), and evolving delivery across web, Impact Factors API.

Customer Order & Document Hub initiative focused on improving customer-specific product catalog & specs, customer order self-service, strengthening customer value for Operations / Production Manager, and evolving delivery across web, Customer Order API.

Release of Customer Order & Document Hub improvements covering customer-specific product catalog & specs, customer order self-service across web, Customer Order API.
